entry.title: Pipedream
entry.description: Workflow automation platform for connecting APIs, building event-driven automations, and integrating developer tools.
entry.seoTitle: Pipedream workflow automation for AI teams
entry.seoDescription: Pipedream connects APIs and services for event-driven automations, workflows, and developer integrations. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
entry.author: Pipedream
entry.cardDescription: Developer workflow automation and API integration platform.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Pipedream is useful when agent workflows need event triggers, API glue, and custom code steps without building a full backend.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
